nodes.name: assign-issue-milestone.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically assigns milestones to newly opened issues based on configured rules.

nodes.name: audit.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow running `cargo audit` to detect security vulnerabilities in Rust dependencies on a scheduled basis.

nodes.name: auto-create-doc-issue-by-issue.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically creates a documentation tracking issue when a new issue is opened with specific labels.

nodes.name: auto-create-doc-issue-by-pr.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically creates a documentation tracking issue when a PR is merged if it carries documentation-affecting labels.

nodes.name: auto-update-helm-and-operator-version-by-release.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically opens PRs to update RisingWave version references in the Helm chart and Kubernetes operator repositories when a new release is published.

nodes.name: build-docker-image-on-demand-ec2.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow for on-demand Docker image builds running on EC2 instances, triggered by workflow dispatch with configurable parameters.

nodes.name: build-docker-image.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes RisingWave Docker images to container registries, triggered by releases or manual dispatch.

nodes.name: bump-main.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that bumps the version on the main branch after a release, updating Cargo.toml and related files.

nodes.name: cherry-pick-since-release-branch.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that cherry-picks all qualifying commits to the latest release branch since a specified point, automating the backport process.

nodes.name: cherry-pick-to-release-branch.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that cherry-picks a specific commit to a target release branch when triggered manually.

nodes.name: connector-node-integration.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow running connector node integration tests against the Java connector service on PRs and pushes.

nodes.name: copilot-setup-steps.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow defining Copilot workspace environment setup steps, installing Rust, dependencies, and project tooling.

nodes.name: dashboard.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and deploys the RisingWave web dashboard to GitHub Pages on merge to main.

nodes.name: doc.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes Rust API documentation to GitHub Pages, triggered on push to main and release tags.

nodes.name: grafana-generate-check.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that validates Grafana dashboard JSON files can be regenerated cleanly from their source templates in PRs.

nodes.name: grafana-generate-prod.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that regenerates and commits updated Grafana dashboard JSON files to the repository when source templates change.

nodes.name: labeler.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs the GitHub labeler action to automatically apply labels to pull requests based on changed file paths.

nodes.name: license_check.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that checks all source files have valid license headers using hawkeye/licenserc tooling on PRs and pushes.

nodes.name: nightly-rust.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that compiles RisingWave with the nightly Rust toolchain on a schedule to detect compatibility issues early.

nodes.name: package_version_check.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs version consistency checks across Cargo, npm, and other package manifests on PRs.

nodes.name: pr-auto-update-with-rebase.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically rebases PRs with the main branch when triggered by a label or comment, using concurrency controls to prevent races.

nodes.name: pr-title-checker.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that validates PR titles conform to the project's conventional commit format using the pr-title-checker action.

nodes.name: protobuf-breaking.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that detects breaking changes in protobuf schema definitions using buf CLI on PRs that modify `.proto` files.

nodes.name: run-main-cron.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers the main Buildkite CI pipeline on a nightly cron schedule to run comprehensive test suites.

nodes.name: run-perf-test.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers performance benchmark tests on dedicated infrastructure when manually dispatched or on schedule.

nodes.name: slt-coverage-check.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that checks SQLLogicTest (SLT) coverage, verifying that new SQL features have corresponding test files.

nodes.name: stale.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically marks and closes stale issues and PRs after configurable periods of inactivity.

nodes.name: trigger-homebrew-bump.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers a Homebrew formula update for RisingWave when a new release is published, keeping the brew tap in sync.

nodes.name: typo.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that scans the codebase for typos using the `typos` tool on PRs and pushes, enforcing the project allowlist from `.typos.toml`.
